title: Declare Hypothesis test dependency
description: The full Python suite cannot collect tests because tests/test_hypothesis.py imports hypothesis, but python/pyproject.toml dev dependencies omit it. Add a bounded Hypothesis dev dependency and refresh the lockfile, then run the full suite.
notes: 2026-07-16 clean-main trial: transplanted pyproject.toml, uv.lock, and test_hypothesis.py from 8e02a7ae9. uv run --locked --extra dev pytest tests/test_hypothesis.py -q produced 12 passed, 1 failed. Failure: test_integer_seqnum_frame_roundtrip constructs mic=b'' but main frame validation requires BITS32/4-byte MIC. This is an intentional dependency on the unsigned-MIC wire migration tracked by 2auf.35, not a reason to weaken the test. Candidate diff was removed from the temporary integration worktree pending 2auf.35.
close_reason: Recovered Hypothesis dev dependency, lock records, and current-API property tests with independent wire/replay oracles. uv lock --check; focused 12 passed; full Python 2663 passed, 26 skipped; Ruff changed-file clean; three final reviews clean. Commit 7e5faf095.
